attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT  
'OPL' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE,
--'N' AS RPO_FLG,
CASE WHEN NSOL.ITEM_CATEGORY_CD in 'Training' THEN 'Y'
WHEN NSOL.PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DT <=DATE THEN 'Y'
ELSE 'N' END RPO_FLG,
0 AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,
RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH,         
RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS FISCAL_MTH,  
'OPL-BSFT' AS SRC_ENTITY, 
COALESCE(NXSCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSO.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID AS WEB_ORDER_ID, 
NSO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NSOL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY   AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NSOL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
COALESCE(TRX.END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,-999) AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='SERVICE' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SERVICE_FLG, 
CASE WHEN (NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID = 'CHARGES' 
OR SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4) = 'MISC'
OR NP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN'
--OR NST.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE <> 'CORP. REVENUE'
OR INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG='I') 
THEN 'N'
ELSE 'Y' END CORP_FLG, 
NPBS.BILLING_TERM_START_DTM     AS CONTRACT_START_DTM,
NPBS.BILLING_TERM_END_DTM     AS CONTRACT_END_DTM,
CAST((CAST(CAST(NPBS.BILLING_TERM_END_DTM AS DATE) -  CAST(NPBS.BILLING_TERM_START_DTM AS DATE) AS INTEGER)*12(FLOAT))/365 AS DECIMAL(15,6) ) AS CONTRACT_TERM,
NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER AS CONTRACT_NUM,
--NPBS.BK_BILLING_SCHEDULE_NUM_INT AS CONTRACT_NUM,   
COALESCE(NSO.BK_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS  ERP_DEAL_ID, 
CAST ( SOLTV.FUTURE_INVOICE_RELEASE_DTM AS DATE ) AS  AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
CASE WHEN SOLTV.FUTURE_INVOICE_RELEASE_DTM IS NULL OR AUTO_RELEASE_DT < RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
THEN 'BNI' ELSE 'FHI' END AS FHI_BNI_FLG, 
SOTV.DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT AS CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,              
NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME   AS ORACLE_BOOK_DTM ,
RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS PROCESS_DT, 
NSOL.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DATE AS SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT,
CASE WHEN SOLH.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y'
     		ELSE  'N' END AS HOLD_FLG,
COALESCE(NSO.EARLY_SHIP_ALLOWED_FLAG,'=') AS EARLY_SHIP_FLG,      
CASE WHEN (COALESCE(NSOL.SHIPPED_QUANTITY ,0) - COALESCE (NSOL.INVOICED_QUANTITY,0))  > 0 THEN 
			CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE <>'SERVICE' THEN 'Y' 
			   ELSE 'N' 
			END
		   ELSE 'N' 
	       	 END AS SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG,
NSOL.CUST_REQUESTED_SHIPMENT_DATE AS CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE (NSOA.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY, NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY) AS ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY ,
COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD,'STANDALONE') AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
CAST(
TRIM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' THEN NSOA.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY            ELSE NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY END) , -9999  )) || '~' ||
TRIM(NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY) || '~' ||   
TRIM(NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY) ||  '~' ||   
TRIM(COALESCE(NSOA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999)
	   ) AS VARCHAR(70))   AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,      
CAST((NSOL.DV_OPL_EXTND_NET_UNIT_TRXL_PRC * (COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)/100) * (coalesce(NXSCA.SPLIT_PCT,100)/100.000000)* COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,16)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(26,16)))) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT, 
--0 AS DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,
NPBS.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS CONVERSION_RATE,
NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM, 
NSOL.PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE AS PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT,
NSOL.SS_CODE AS SS_CD,
NULL AS DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT,
NULL AS DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT,  
NULL AS DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT,   
NULL  AS DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT,
COALESCE(NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'Daily Rates') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
NULL AS DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT,           
COALESCE(AVG_TM.AVG_TERM,21) AS DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT, 
'1900-01-01' AS DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
NPBS.BILLING_TERM_START_DTM AS DV_WATERFALL_START_DT,
NPBS.BILLING_TERM_END_DTM AS	DV_WATERFALL_END_DT,
CAST(CASE WHEN ROUND(CAST((CAST(CAST(  DV_WATERFALL_END_DT AS DATE) -  CAST(DV_WATERFALL_START_DT AS DATE) AS INTEGER)) AS DECIMAL(15,6) ) ) =0 THEN 1
ELSE ROUND(CAST((CAST(CAST( DV_WATERFALL_END_DT AS DATE) - CAST(DV_WATERFALL_START_DT AS DATE) AS INTEGER))+1 AS DECIMAL(15,6) ) ) END AS INTEGER) DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) AS TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
COALESCE(MSR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,'='), 
RP.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
ALCTN.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
NULL AS DV_MILESTONE_START_DT,         
NULL AS DV_MILESTONE_END_DT,
NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY  AS DV_ORDER_QUANTITY, 
Cast((NSOL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE* (Coalesce(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)/100) * (coalesce(NXSCA.SPLIT_PCT,100)/100.000000) * NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY * COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,7)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(26,7)))) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
--COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100) AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT,   
Cast(Coalesce (NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100) *(coalesce(NXSCA.SPLIT_PCT,100)/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
CAST(coalesce(NXSCA.SPLIT_PCT,100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT  ,
'Y' AS TSV_FLG  ,
NPBS.BK_BILLING_SCHEDULE_NUM_INT AS DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID  ,
CASE WHEN NSOL.ITEM_CATEGORY_CD in 'Training' THEN 'Y'
WHEN NSOL.PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DT <=DATE THEN 'Y'
ELSE 'N' END DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG, /*Q2FY23:PPMT December Release-DPDE-9172*/   
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
INNER JOIN 
 (
 SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y'  AND FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE <> Current_Date 
 UNION ALL
 SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE =Current_Date-1
 AND PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG IN 'Y'
) RFM
ON 1=1
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND NSOL.SS_CODE=NSO.SS_CODE 
AND CAST(NSO.END_TV_DATETIME AS DATE) = '3500-01-01'
AND CAST(NSOL.END_TV_DATETIME AS DATE) = '3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN (SELECT SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_SS_CD,MIN(BILLING_TERM_START_DTM) BILLING_TERM_START_DTM,MAX(BILLING_TERM_END_DTM) BILLING_TERM_END_DTM,
MAX(BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD) BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD,MIN(BK_BILLING_SCHEDULE_NUM_INT) BK_BILLING_SCHEDULE_NUM_INT, MIN(BILLING_SCHEDULE_BATCH_ID ) BILLING_SCHEDULE_BATCH_ID  
FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_PERIODIC_BILLING_SCHEDULE 
WHERE BILLING_STATUS_NAME NOT IN ('INVOICED','CLOSED')
GROUP BY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,BK_SS_CD )  NPBS
ON NPBS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NPBS.BK_SS_CD=NSOL.SS_CODE
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_OA NSOA
ON NSOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN('ATTRIBUTED')
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
ON ( NPBS.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD = NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD' 
AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=(SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'))
	
LEFT JOIN (select MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY,END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX 
WHERE ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY ORDER BY MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY DESC)=1)TRX  
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = TRX.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX NXSCA
ON NXSCA.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=TRX.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
AND NXSCA.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND NXSCA.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD = 'DR'

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON COALESCE(NSOA.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY           ,NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY)=NP.ITEM_KEY

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS RP
ON COALESCE(NSOA.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY           ,NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY)=RP.ITEM_KEY

LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SOLTV
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=SOLTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
AND NSOL.SS_CODE=SOLTV.SS_CODE

LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV SOTV
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SOTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
AND NSO.SS_CODE=SOTV.SS_CD  

LEFT OUTER JOIN
 (  SELECT A.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SALES_ORDER_LN_HOLD_ACTIVE A 
GROUP BY A.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)  SOLH
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=SOLH.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

INNER  JOIN ( SELECT 
 DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT, PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD, ALLOCATION_PCT 
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN  WHERE  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS','UNKNOWN')
 AND DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT=(SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR   WHERE  CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG = 'Y')
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
 QUALIFY RANK()  OVER (PARTITION BY DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT,PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD  
	 ORDER BY  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD DESC  ) = 1
) ALCTN
ON NP.ITEM_KEY= ALCTN.PRODUCT_KEY 

LEFT JOIN (
SELECT DISTINCT ITEM_KEY,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM 
WHERE ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IN ( 'IMMEDIATE' , 'DAILY RATES' )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY ITEM_KEY ORDER BY  SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  ASC , EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME DESC )=1
)NII
ON COALESCE (NSOA.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY, NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY) =NII.ITEM_KEY

LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_DFR_GROSS_UNBILLED_AVG_TERM AVG_TM
ON AVG_TM.BUSINESS_UNIT=RP.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID 
AND COALESCE(AVG_TM.END_DATE ,DATE)>=DATE

LEFT JOIN (
   SEL   SALES_ORDER_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, PRODUCT_KEY,CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG  FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKGS_MEASURE_ORDER_MTH WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD    ='XAAS'
AND CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG NOT IN ('=')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SALES_ORDER_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, PRODUCT_KEY ORDER BY FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT DESC)=1
   ) MSR
  ON MSR.SALES_ORDER_KEY  =NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  AND MSR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           =COALESCE (NXSCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999)           
  AND MSR.PRODUCT_KEY                   =COALESCE (NSOA.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY, NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY)

LEFT OUTER JOIN  (SELECT INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG, CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV NCA 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY_TV NEP
ON NEP.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER = NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER
AND  NEP.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND NCA.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND NEP.ERP_PARTY_NAME NOT LIKE '%REGRESSION%TEST%') TEMP1
ON NSO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = TEMP1.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY
  

WHERE NSO.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'ACQ-BSFT'
AND NSO.SS_CODE= 'OPL'
AND NSOL.LINE_STATUS_CD NOT IN ('INVOICED','CLOSED','ENTERED','PENDING_APPROVAL','CANCELLED')
AND NSOL.PERIODIC_BILLING_FLG='Y'
/*AND NPBS.BILLING_STATUS_NAME NOT IN ('INVOICED')*/

SELECT
MAX(WF.TRANSACTION_TYPE) TRANSACTION_TYPE             
,MAX(WF.RPO_FLG) RPO_FLG                      
,SUM(WF.UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT) UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT          
,MAX(WF.PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH) PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH         
,MIN(CASE WHEN WF.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT >= RFM1.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN  RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT
ELSE CAST(CASE WHEN (RFM1.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT MOD 100) =12 THEN (RFM1.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT-12)+100 ELSE RFM1.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT END AS INTEGER)+1
END) AS FISCAL_MTH_AS                   
,MAX(WF.SRC_ENTITY) SRC_ENTITY                    
,WF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           
,WF.PRODUCT_KEY                   
,MAX(WF.SALES_ORDER_KEY)               
,WF.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY          
,MAX(WF.WEB_ORDER_ID)                  
,MAX(WF.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY)          
,MAX(WF.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY )         
,MAX(WF.SOLD_TO_CUST_ACCT_KEY )        
,MAX(WF.END_CUSTOMER_KEY   )           
,MAX(WF.SERVICE_FLG        )           
,MAX(WF.CORP_FLG           )           
,MIN(WF.CONTRACT_START_DTM )           
,MAX(WF.CONTRACT_END_DTM  )           
,MAX(WF.CONTRACT_TERM      )           
,MAX(WF.CONTRACT_NUM       )           
,MAX(WF.ERP_DEAL_ID        )           
,MAX(WF.AUTO_RELEASE_DT    )           
,MAX(WF.FHI_BNI_FLG        )           
,MAX(WF.CISCO_BOOKED_DT    )           
,MAX(WF.ORACLE_BOOK_DTM    )           
,MIN(CASE WHEN WF.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT >= RFM1.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE THEN RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE ELSE RFM1.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE END) AS PROCESS_DT_AS                   
,MAX(WF.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT  )           
,MAX(WF.HOLD_FLG           )           
,MAX(WF.EARLY_SHIP_FLG     )           
,MAX(WF.SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG )      
,MAX(WF.CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT   )     
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM                
,USER EDW_CREATE_USER               
,CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_UPDATE_DTM                
,USER EDW_UPDATE_USER               
,WF.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY        
,MAX(WF.DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD )            
,MAX(WF.DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD )         
,SUM(WF.DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT )      
,MAX(WF.DD_FB_TRXL_CURRENCY_CD   )     
,MAX(WF.PL_CONVERSION_RATE       )     
,MAX(WF.DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM ) 
,MAX(WF.DD_FB_PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT )
,MAX(WF.DD_FB_SS_CD                   )
,MAX(WF.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT )
,MAX(WF.DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT  )
,MAX(WF.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT  ) 
,MAX(WF.DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT    ) 
,MAX(WF.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME         ) 
,MAX(WF.DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT)           
,MAX(WF.DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT      )            
,MAX(WF.DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT           ) 
,MIN(WF.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT        )    
,MAX(WF.DV_WATERFALL_END_DT          )    
,SUM(WF.DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT )
,30 AS  DAYS_IN_MTH 
,SUM(WF.UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT) AS WF_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT
,0 DV_REM_UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT
,-1 MONTH_AGE
,CAST(1  AS INTEGER) AS DEPTH
,MIN(WF.TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID)
,0 AS DV_REM_TERM_MONTHS_CNT
,MAX(WF.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG )
,MAX(WF.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID )
,MAX(WF.DV_MILESTONE_START_DT )
,MAX(WF.DV_MILESTONE_END_DT )
,MAX(WF.DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT )
,MAX(WF.DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT )
,MIN(WF.DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID)
,MAX(WF.DV_RPO_ACTIVE_FLG) /*Q2FY23:PPMT December Release-DPDE-9172*/
FROM
  $$STGDB.WI_UNB_REV_BSFT_WF_AT_Y WF 
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFM
   ON RFM.CALENDAR_DATE = WF.DV_WATERFALL_START_DT
   INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_DAY_TO_YEAR RFM1
   ON RFM1.CALENDAR_DATE = DATE
  WHERE WF.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IN('Immediate')
  AND WF.TSV_FLG = 'N'
  GROUP BY WF.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY, WF.ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY, WF.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, WF.PRODUCT_KEY

SELECT  
'OPL' AS TRANSACTION_TYPE,
--'N' AS RPO_FLG,
CASE WHEN NSOL.ITEM_CATEGORY_CD in 'Training' THEN 'Y'
WHEN NSOL.PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DT  <=DATE THEN 'Y'
ELSE 'N' END RPO_FLG,
CAST(((COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)/100)*(coalesce(NXSCA.SPLIT_PCT,100)/100.000000)* (NPBS.BILL_LOCAL_AMT-NPBS.INVOICE_LOCAL_AMT) * COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,16)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(26,16)))) AS DECIMAL(26, 7) )  AS UNBILLED_REVENUE_AMT,  
RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS PROCESSED_FISCAL_MTH,         
RFM.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT AS FISCAL_MTH,  
'OPL-BSFT' AS SRC_ENTITY, 
COALESCE(NXSCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999) SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY AS PRODUCT_KEY,
NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY AS SALES_ORDER_KEY,
NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
NSO.BK_WEB_ORDER_ID AS WEB_ORDER_ID, 
NSO.BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY AS BILL_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NSOL.SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY   AS SHIP_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
NSOL.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY AS SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY,
COALESCE(TRX.END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,-999) AS END_CUSTOMER_KEY, 
CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE='SERVICE' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS SERVICE_FLG, 
--'Y' AS CORP_FLG,
CASE WHEN (NP.BK_PRODUCT_TYPE_ID = 'CHARGES' 
OR SUBSTR(NP.BK_PRODUCT_ID,1,4) = 'MISC'
OR NP.DIVESTITURE_TYPE_CD <> 'UNKNOWN'
OR NST.BK_SALES_HIERARCHY_TYPE_CODE <> 'CORP. REVENUE'
OR INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG='I') 
THEN 'N'
ELSE 'Y' END CORP_FLG, 
NPBS.BILLING_TERM_START_DTM     AS CONTRACT_START_DTM,
NPBS.BILLING_TERM_END_DTM     AS CONTRACT_END_DTM,
CAST((CAST(CAST(NPBS.BILLING_TERM_END_DTM AS DATE) -  CAST(NPBS.BILLING_TERM_START_DTM AS DATE) AS INTEGER)*12(FLOAT))/365 AS DECIMAL(15,6) ) AS CONTRACT_TERM,
/* CASE WHEN ( CAST(NPBS.BILLING_TERM_START_DTM AS DATE ) - CAST(NPBS.BILLING_TERM_END_DTM AS DATE ) )  IS   NOT NULL 
  THEN  CAST((CAST(CAST(NPBS.BILLING_TERM_END_DTM AS DATE) -  CAST(NPBS.BILLING_TERM_START_DTM AS DATE) AS INTEGER)*12(FLOAT))/365 AS DECIMAL(15,6) )
										   WHEN  SOLTV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT > 0
															THEN SOLTV.RU_SRVC_CNTRCT_DRTN_MNTHS_CNT 
ELSE NULL END CONTRACT_TERM,*/
NSOL.RU_SERVICE_CONTRACT_NUMBER AS CONTRACT_NUM,
--NPBS.BK_BILLING_SCHEDULE_NUM_INT AS CONTRACT_NUM,   
COALESCE(NSO.BK_DEAL_ID,'UNKNOWN') AS  ERP_DEAL_ID, 
CAST ( SOLTV.FUTURE_INVOICE_RELEASE_DTM AS DATE ) AS  AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
CASE WHEN SOLTV.FUTURE_INVOICE_RELEASE_DTM IS NULL OR AUTO_RELEASE_DT < RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE
THEN 'BNI' ELSE 'FHI' END AS FHI_BNI_FLG, 
SOTV.DV_CISCO_BOOKED_DT AS CISCO_BOOKED_DT ,              
NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME   AS ORACLE_BOOK_DTM ,
RFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE AS PROCESS_DT, 
NSOL.SCHEDULED_SHIP_DATE AS SCHEDULED_SHIP_DT,
CASE WHEN SOLH.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NOT NULL THEN 'Y'
     		ELSE  'N' END AS HOLD_FLG,
COALESCE(NSO.EARLY_SHIP_ALLOWED_FLAG,'=') AS EARLY_SHIP_FLG,      
CASE WHEN (COALESCE(NSOL.SHIPPED_QUANTITY ,0) - COALESCE (NSOL.INVOICED_QUANTITY,0))  > 0 THEN 
			CASE WHEN NP.GOODS_OR_SERVICE_TYPE <>'SERVICE' THEN 'Y' 
			   ELSE 'N' 
			END
		   ELSE 'N' 
	       	 END AS SHIPPED_NOT_INVOICED_FLG,
NSOL.CUST_REQUESTED_SHIPMENT_DATE AS CUST_RQSTD_SHIPMENT_DT, 
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE (NSOA.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY, NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY) AS ATTRIBUTED_PRODUCT_KEY ,
COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD,'STANDALONE') AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_CD,
CAST(
TRIM(COALESCE((CASE WHEN NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD='ATTRIBUTED' THEN NSOA.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY            ELSE NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY END) , -9999  )) || '~' ||
TRIM(NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY) || '~' ||   
TRIM(NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY) ||  '~' ||   
TRIM(COALESCE(NSOA.BK_OFFER_ATTRIBUTION_ID_INT,-9999)
	   ) AS VARCHAR(70))   AS DV_RECURRING_OFFER_CD,      
CAST((NSOL.DV_OPL_EXTND_NET_UNIT_TRXL_PRC * (COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)/100) * (coalesce(NXSCA.SPLIT_PCT,100)/100.000000)* COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,16)),CAST(1 AS DECIMAL(26,16)))) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT, 
--0 AS DV_TOTAL_SALES_VALUE_AMT,
NPBS.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD AS TRXL_CURRENCY_CD,
CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(32,15)) AS CONVERSION_RATE,
NSOL.BK_SO_SRC_CRT_DATETIME AS DD_FB_SO_LINE_SRC_CREATE_DTM, 
NSOL.PROMISED_TO_CUST_SHIPMENT_DATE AS PROMISED_TO_SHIPMENT_DT,
NSOL.SS_CODE AS SS_CD,
NULL AS DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_START_DT,
NULL AS DV_PROJECTED_CONTRACT_END_DT,  
NULL AS DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_START_DT,   
NULL  AS DV_CONTRACT_HEADER_END_DT,
COALESCE(NII.ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME,'Daily Rates') AS ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME, 
NULL AS DV_AR_ACCOUNTING_TERM_MTH_INT,           
COALESCE(AVG_TM.AVG_TERM,21) AS DV_AVERAGE_TERM_MTH_INT, 
'1900-01-01' AS DV_AUTO_RELEASE_DT,
NPBS.BILLING_TERM_START_DTM AS DV_WATERFALL_START_DT,
NPBS.BILLING_TERM_END_DTM AS	DV_WATERFALL_END_DT,
CAST(CASE WHEN ROUND(CAST((CAST(CAST(  DV_WATERFALL_END_DT AS DATE) -  CAST(DV_WATERFALL_START_DT AS DATE) AS INTEGER)) AS DECIMAL(15,6) ) ) =0 THEN 1
ELSE ROUND(CAST((CAST(CAST( DV_WATERFALL_END_DT AS DATE) - CAST(DV_WATERFALL_START_DT AS DATE) AS INTEGER))+1 AS DECIMAL(15,6) ) ) END AS INTEGER) DV_WATERFALL_TERM_DAYS_INT,
ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY) AS TRANSACTION_SEQ_ID,
COALESCE(MSR.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,'='), 
RP.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID,
ALCTN.BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD,
NULL AS DV_MILESTONE_START_DT,         
NULL AS DV_MILESTONE_END_DT,
NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY  AS DV_ORDER_QUANTITY, 
Cast((NSOL.UNIT_LIST_PRICE* (Coalesce(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100)/100) * (coalesce(NXSCA.SPLIT_PCT,100)/100.000000) * NSOL.ORDER_QUANTITY * COALESCE(CAST(NCCDR.PL_CONVERSION_RATE AS DECIMAL(26,7)),CAST( 1 AS DECIMAL(26,7)))) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) DV_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
--COALESCE(NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100) AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT,   
Cast(Coalesce (NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_PCT,100) *(coalesce(NXSCA.SPLIT_PCT,100)/100.000000)  AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_ATTRIBUTION_PCT,
CAST(coalesce(NXSCA.SPLIT_PCT,100) AS DECIMAL(18,6)) AS DV_SALES_COMMISSION_PCT,
'N' AS TSV_FLG ,
NPBS.BK_BILLING_SCHEDULE_NUM_INT  AS DV_BILLING_CYCLE_ID ,
CASE WHEN NSOL.ITEM_CATEGORY_CD in 'Training' THEN 'Y'
WHEN NSOL.PERIODIC_BILLING_START_DT  <=DATE THEN 'Y'
ELSE 'N' END RPO_FLG,/*Q2FY23:PPMT December Release-DPDE-9172*/       
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
INNER JOIN 
 (
 SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE FROM  $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG ='Y'  AND FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE <> Current_Date 
 UNION ALL
 SELECT FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT,FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE =Current_Date-1
 AND PREVIOUS_FSCL_MONTH_FLAG IN 'Y'
 ) RFM
ON 1=1
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSO
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND NSOL.SS_CODE=NSO.SS_CODE 
AND CAST(NSO.END_TV_DATETIME AS DATE) = '3500-01-01'
AND CAST(NSOL.END_TV_DATETIME AS DATE) = '3500-01-01'
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_PERIODIC_BILLING_SCHEDULE NPBS
ON NPBS.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NPBS.BK_SS_CD=NSOL.SS_CODE
LEFT JOIN $$STGDB.WI_UNBILLED_OA NSOA
ON NSOA.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
AND NSOA.ATTRIBUTION_CD IN('ATTRIBUTED')
LEFT JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CURRENCY_CONV_DAILY_RATE NCCDR
ON ( NPBS.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CD = NCCDR.BK_FROM_CURRENCY_CODE
AND NCCDR.BK_TO_CURRENCY_CODE='USD' 
AND NCCDR.BK_CONVERSION_DATE=(SELECT FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR WHERE CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG='Y'))
/*CROSS JOIN 
(
SELECT	 NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_START_DATE,NFM.FISCAL_MONTH_END_DATE,BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,BPDC.PROCESS_DATE
FROM	 $$COMREFVWDB.N_FISCAL_MONTH NFM, $$ETLVWDB.BKG_PROCESS_DT_CNTRL BPDC
WHERE	 NFM.BK_FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_YEAR_NUMBER_INT
	AND	 NFM.BK_FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT=BPDC.FISCAL_MONTH_NUMBER_INT) FMNI */
	
LEFT JOIN (select MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY,END_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE_KEY,SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY from $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SO_SBSCR_ITM_SLS_TRX 
WHERE ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD ='ACQ-BSFT'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY ORDER BY MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY DESC)=1)TRX  /* need to make sure only one transaction should qualify */
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY = TRX.MINOR_LN_EXAAS_SUBSCR_SOL_KEY

LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_XAAS_SLS_CRDT_ASGNMT_SLS_TRX NXSCA
ON NXSCA.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY=TRX.SO_SBSCRPTN_ITM_SLS_TRX_KEY
AND NXSCA.EFFECTIVE_END_DTM='3500-01-01 00:00:00'
AND NXSCA.BK_SLS_TERR_ASGNMT_TYPE_CD = 'DR'

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRODUCT NP
ON COALESCE(NSOA.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY           ,NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY)=NP.ITEM_KEY

INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.R_PRODUCTS RP
ON COALESCE(NSOA.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY           ,NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY)=RP.ITEM_KEY

LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_V1_TV SOLTV
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=SOLTV.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY 
AND NSOL.SS_CODE=SOLTV.SS_CODE

LEFT JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_V1_TV SOTV
ON NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY=SOTV.SALES_ORDER_KEY 
AND NSO.SS_CODE=SOTV.SS_CD  

LEFT OUTER JOIN
 (  SELECT A.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY
FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_SALES_ORDER_LN_HOLD_ACTIVE A 
GROUP BY A.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY)  SOLH
ON NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=SOLH.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY

INNER  JOIN ( SELECT 
 DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT, PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD, ALLOCATION_PCT 
 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_PRDT_TO_PRDT_CLSFTN_ALCTN  WHERE  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD IN ('BOOKINGS','UNKNOWN')
 AND DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT=(SEL FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUMBER_INT  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.R_FISCAL_MONTH_TO_YEAR   WHERE  CURRENT_FISCAL_MONTH_FLAG = 'Y')
 GROUP BY 1,2,3,4,5
 QUALIFY RANK()  OVER (PARTITION BY DV_FISCAL_YEAR_QUARTER_NUM_INT,PRODUCT_KEY, BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_METRIC_CD  
	 ORDER BY  BK_PRDT_ALLCTN_CLSFCTN_CD DESC  ) = 1
) ALCTN
ON NP.ITEM_KEY= ALCTN.PRODUCT_KEY 

LEFT JOIN (
SELECT DISTINCT ITEM_KEY,ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME  FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM 
WHERE ACCOUNTING_RULE_NAME IN ( 'IMMEDIATE' , 'DAILY RATES' )
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY ITEM_KEY ORDER BY  SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  ASC , EDW_UPDATE_DATETIME DESC )=1
)NII
ON COALESCE (NSOA.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY, NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY) =NII.ITEM_KEY

LEFT JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_DFR_GROSS_UNBILLED_AVG_TERM AVG_TM
ON AVG_TM.BUSINESS_UNIT=RP.BK_BUSINESS_UNIT_ID 
AND COALESCE(AVG_TM.END_DATE ,DATE)>=DATE

LEFT JOIN (
   SEL   SALES_ORDER_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, PRODUCT_KEY,CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG  FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.MT_BKGS_MEASURE_ORDER_MTH WHERE BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CD    ='XAAS'
AND CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG NOT IN ('=')
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SALES_ORDER_KEY, SALES_TERRITORY_KEY, PRODUCT_KEY ORDER BY FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT DESC)=1
   ) MSR
  ON MSR.SALES_ORDER_KEY  =NSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY
  AND MSR.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY           =COALESCE (NXSCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY , -999)          
  AND MSR.PRODUCT_KEY                   =COALESCE (NSOA.ORDERED_PRODUCT_KEY, NSOL.PRODUCT_KEY) 
  
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_TERRITORY NST
ON NST.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY = COALESCE (NXSCA.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,-999)

LEFT OUTER JOIN  (SELECT INTERNAL_CUSTOMER_FLAG, CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY
FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_TV NCA 
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_PARTY_TV NEP
ON NEP.ERP_PARTY_NUMBER = NCA.ERP_CUSTOMER_NUMBER
AND  NEP.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND NCA.END_TV_DATE='3500-01-01'
AND NEP.ERP_PARTY_NAME NOT LIKE '%REGRESSION%TEST%') TEMP1
ON NSO.SOLD_TO_CUSTOMER_KEY = TEMP1.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY  

WHERE NSO.ACQUISITION_ORDER_ORIGIN_CD = 'ACQ-BSFT'
AND NSO.SS_CODE= 'OPL'
--AND NPBS.BILLING_STATUS_NAME NOT IN ('INVOICED','CLOSED','ENTERED','PENDING_APPROVAL')
AND NSOL.LINE_STATUS_CD NOT IN ('INVOICED','CLOSED','ENTERED','PENDING_APPROVAL','CANCELLED') 
AND NSOL.PERIODIC_BILLING_FLG='Y'
AND NPBS.BILLING_STATUS_NAME NOT IN ('INVOICED')
